work_unit: deep-audit: core Python backend + relay scripts
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete after sunset-prediction audit-2026-07-06-020 all 10 fixes merged. Triggered new full audit cycle. Selected personal-assistant (Python+Android+web assistant platform) as next unaudited project.
action: Deep security+correctness audit via sonnet sub-agent. Read 9 source files across auth/api/ws_manager/storage/memory/config/llm modules plus audio_relay and ecs_relay scripts. Traced data flows across auth→API→WS→storage layers.
outcome_evidence: Produced audit-2026-07-06-021.md with 12 findings (4H/6M/2L). Key: H-001 ws_xiaozhi unauthenticated, H-002 CORS wildcard+dev bypass, H-003 relay token log leak, H-004 audio relay 0.0.0.0 no auth. 10 route-fixes registered in audit-cycle-state.derived_fixes as pending.
next_suggestion: Derive fix for H-001+M-001 (WS auth gap in api.py:199 + auth.py:49 exemption) — highest priority, same fix pattern
Derive fix for H-003 (token log leak in tunnel_client.py:51) — isolated, quick win
Derive fix for H-004 (audio_relay 0.0.0.0 binding) — standalone file

audit_findings.finding: /ws/xiaozhi endpoint skips WebSocket token authentication entirely
audit_findings.remediation: Add verify_ws_token check before xiaozhi_endpoint call

audit_findings.finding: CORS allows all origins with wildcard while auth can be disabled
audit_findings.remediation: Replace allow_origins=['*'] with explicit trusted origin list

audit_findings.finding: WebSocket relay token leaked in plaintext to stdout log
Audio relay binds 0.0.0.0 with no authentication
/ws/ prefix exempted from HTTP auth but ws_xiaozhi has no self-auth
audit_findings.remediation: Remove /ws/ from exemptions; ensure each WS handler self-authenticates

audit_findings.finding: POST /chat blocks async event loop with sync LLM call
.env parser mishandles values with = and mixed quoting
Origin validation bypassed when Origin header absent
inbox/upload no body size limit, disk exhaustion DoS
audit_findings.remediation: Add streaming size check before write

audit_findings.finding: Heartbeat sends zero-byte binary frame instead of WS ping
POST /verify returns assertion failures in 200 body
